raw_consumer_statement: XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXThis order was canceled- the office was never received and the store canceled- though Ive showed them the cancelled transaction- which should have never posted, they are leaving the balance there to accrue interest- thats not fair especially for goods never received. I shouldnt have to keep begging them to remove something I never received. Its not my fault all thats systems messed up - and whats the point of this service because youll never help? Does tax money go towards this because people do need help, they are being over and making peoples life hard. I pay them on time, and I need assistance with this matter; many more  this is stressful and causes anger '
